design_philosophy: Functional beauty. Color exists only to guide action. Stark, objective, and clear. Zero distractions for pure AI interaction.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8 for containers. Generous line-height for chat messages.
spacing_and_layout.chat_container: max-w-3xl mx-auto w-full px-4 md:px-8 pt-24 pb-32
spacing_and_layout.composer: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 w-full md:pl-72 z-50 p-4 bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0A0A0A] via-[#0A0A0A]/90 to-transparent pointer-events-none

surfaces_and_borders.composer_input: Glassmorphism: bg-[#121212]/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-2 pl-4 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] pointer-events-auto
surfaces_and_borders.dropdowns: Neumorphism mix: bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 shadow-2xl rounded-xl
surfaces_and_borders.buttons: Sharp corners or subtle 8px rounding. Primary buttons are pure white with black text.

TelegramLogin.style: Center screen on unauthenticated state. Minimalist wrapper, let the widget handle its native styling but wrap in a clean Card.

ChatThread.style: List of messages. AI messages have no background, just text. User messages are right-aligned or distinctly styled with a subtle dark grey bubble.

MessageBubble.user: bg-[#1E1E1E] border border-white/5 text-white px-5 py-3 rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm max-w-[85%]

ModelSelector.style: Use Shadcn Select. Minimal border, crisp text. Positioned top-left or top-center of the chat header.

Composer.style: Textarea with auto-resize. Send button on the right (Icon only, pure white bg, black icon, rounded-xl).

HistorySidebar.style: List of recent chats. Hover state: bg-white/5. Active state: bg-white/10. Text truncate for long titles.

CodeBlock.style: bg-[#050505] border border-white/10 rounded-xl overflow-hidden. Header bar with language and 'Copy' button.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Transition transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease. Buttons lift slightly (-translate-y-[1px]).

media.notes: No external imagery required. Interface relies entirely on typography, negative space, and functional UI elements. Avatar loaded dynamically from Telegram.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure strict mobile responsiveness. The sidebar MUST be a hidden drawer (using Shadcn Sheet) on mobile, triggered by a hamburger menu.
Chat composer must sit securely above the mobile safe-area keyboard.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000), stick to the #0A0A0A base.
Use Outfit for main titles/brand and Inter for chat readability.
All interactive elements MUST have the specified data-testid.
Code blocks in markdown must be styled beautifully with syntax highlighting and a copy button.
Use Shadcn UI components extensively but strip away unnecessary styles to match the stark, minimal aesthetic.
